Removed_Other.name: FFlagUseMultipleStrokes_PlaceFilter
Removed_Other.mechanism: Allows the use of multiple strokes in place filtering for better precision.
Removed_Other.purpose: Enhances the player's ability to filter and select items more accurately.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagUseScaledStrokes_PlaceFilter
Removed_Other.mechanism: Adjusts stroke sizes based on screen scaling for better visuals.
Removed_Other.purpose: Improves the appearance of place filters, making them easier to read and use.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagWindowsSystemThemeEnabled_IXP
Removed_Other.mechanism: Enables the use of the Windows system theme for the interface.
Removed_Other.purpose: Provides a more cohesive and familiar look for Windows users.
